enriched_points.expanded_content: A comprehensive literature review synthesizes existing research on well-being frameworks, identifying key theories, methodologies, and gaps in knowledge, as highlighted by various academic sources.

A thorough examination of current well-being frameworks allows for the assessment of their effectiveness and relevance, utilizing mixed-methods approaches to summarize progress and identify best practices.
Conducting interviews with leading experts provides qualitative insights into well-being indicators, enriching the research with practical perspectives and experiences from the field.
